title: Rootly integration connection fails on local Docker with UNKNOWN error
description: When trying to setup Rootly integration on locally running app (Docker), connection fails with Error Code: UNKNOWN
close_reason: Ignored per user request

title: The left tile (Overall Risk Level) looks empty - make it look better
Align risk score and incidents number for visual consistency
close_reason: Added explicit pt-0 to both CardContent elements to ensure the score and incidents numbers align at the same vertical position

title: Correct markdown in README - fix bold formatting with spaces
close_reason: Fixed markdown bold formatting (removed spaces inside **), fixed typo 'Appliecation' -> 'Application', used backticks for URL

title: Add retry logic for Rootly API to prevent analysis getting stuck
description: Added retry logic with exponential backoff for ConnectionResetError and other transient network errors in Rootly client
close_reason: Added _request_with_retry() method with exponential backoff for ConnectionResetError, httpx errors, and other transient network errors. Updated get_on_call_shifts() to use retry logic. Fixed timeout message to correctly say 15 minutes.

title: Move incidents card under risk factors tile
description: In MemberDetailModal, position the incidents card directly below the risk factors tile instead of at the bottom right with Ticketing.
close_reason: Moved incidents card to be directly under UserRiskFactorsCard, removed from bottom grid with Ticketing

title: Add collapsible incident list to UserIncidentCard
description: The incident tile should feature a list of all incidents the user was part of. For each incident, show the severity. This data should be in a collapsible/folded section that users can click to expand.
close_reason: Added collapsible incident list to UserIncidentCard. Shows all incidents the user was involved in with severity badges. List is collapsed by default and expands on click.

title: Make Jira workload active tickets list collapsible
description: The Jira workload active tickets list should be folded/collapsible by default, similar to the incident list feature.
close_reason: Made Jira active tickets list collapsible in both JiraTicketCard and JiraTicketCardContent, matching Linear issues behavior

title: Display incident status in incident list
description: In the collapsible incident list (UserIncidentCard), display the status of each incident on the right side of each row.
close_reason: Added incident status display on the right side of each incident row with color coding (green=resolved, blue=mitigated, red=active, orange=acknowledged). Also updated text to 'View incidents'.

title: Fetch user profile images from PagerDuty/Rootly
description: For every user in the app, fetch their profile image from PagerDuty or Rootly APIs so we can display avatars throughout the application.
close_reason: Implemented avatar_url storage and display: added column to UserCorrelation model, updated user_sync_service to fetch from PagerDuty/Rootly APIs, added migration, passed avatar_url through analyses.py to unified_burnout_analyzer and into member analysis data, updated frontend TeamMembersList and MemberDetailModal to display avatar images

title: Shorten team analysis description text
description: Change 'Holistic burnout analysis combining incident response patterns and development activity across 17 team members' to something shorter that does not contain the word 'burnout'.
close_reason: Shortened team analysis descriptions - removed verbose text, made concise (e.g., 'Incidents + GitHub activity for N members')

title: p1
close_reason: Moved integration source icons (GitHub, Slack, Jira, Linear, Survey) to be inline with username instead of below avatar on home page user cards

title: on the Team Member Risk Levels tile, where we display the little source icons, also include rootly and pagerduty ones when appropriate
close_reason: Added Rootly and PagerDuty icons to TeamMembersList.tsx - icons appear inline when rootly_user_id/pagerduty_user_id is set

title: Improve readability of Jira Workload tile
description: The current tile layout is scattered and requires effort to read. Not super appealing. Need to improve visual hierarchy and make it easier to scan at a glance.
close_reason: Redesigned TicketingCard with better visual hierarchy - hero stats on top, color-coded overdue/due items, consistent styling for Jira and Linear

title: Make the order of tiles in individual windows dynamic
description: Tiles that have no data should be pushed to the bottom. Tiles with meaningful data should appear first for better user experience.
close_reason: Implemented dynamic tile ordering in MemberDetailModal.tsx - tiles with data appear first, empty tiles pushed to bottom

title: Center 'Active Tickets' text in Jira/Linear windows
close_reason: Refactored TicketingCard to display all stats (Active Tickets, Overdue, Due in 7 Days, High Priority) in a consistent row with centered text and uniform styling

title: Create process to update Demo Analysis data
description: We pre-populate a Demo Analysis with every new account. Need to establish a process for updating this demo data when the schema changes or new features are added (e.g., adding rootly_user_id to members). Currently requires manual database updates and mock_analysis_data.json edits.
close_reason: Created manage_demo_analyses.py CLI script and POST /api/admin/refresh-demo-analyses endpoint. Process: 1) Edit mock_analysis_data.json 2) Run script or call API endpoint to refresh all demo analyses

title: Fix organization selector: purple circle missing in selected state, investigate star icon
close_reason: Fixed typo: bg-purple-2000 → bg-purple-500 in SelectTrigger. Star icon is intentional to indicate selected organization.

title: Connect with Linear logo should use linear-logo-light.png
description: Update the Connect with Linear button/logo to use the linear-logo-light.png file instead of the current implementation
close_reason: Updated LinearIntegrationCard.tsx to use linear-logo-light.png for the Connect with Linear button

title: Add Rootly Integration should use rootly-logo-icon.jpg
description: The Add Rootly Integration section is showing a different/old Rootly logo. Update it to use rootly-logo-icon.jpg for consistency
close_reason: Changed Rootly integration logo from rootly-logo-branded.png to rootly-logo-icon.jpg

title: In the Jira Workload cell, the active tickets should be centered to mimic other cells
close_reason: Added justify-center to hero stat row in all 4 ticketing components (JiraTicketCardContent, JiraTicketCard, LinearIssueCardContent, LinearIssueCard)

title: Investigate: Is Claude enabled to check all commits done via GitHub Action? Not visible on testing branch
close_reason: Claude code review workflow only triggers on pull_request events, not direct pushes. Either create PRs or modify workflow to add push trigger for specific branches.

title: Jira/Linear workload card: Add third cell showing count of high priority tasks (High/Urgent/Critical)
close_reason: Added third cell for high priority count in attention items row for all 4 ticketing components (Jira: High Priority, Linear: Urgent/High). Removed redundant badge from top row.

title: Risk Level graph: Reverse color logic - increase (higher risk) should be red, decrease should be green
close_reason: Fixed color logic in TrendsCard.tsx - now all metrics show red for increase (worse) and green for decrease (better)

title: Make demo data banner super visible - currently easy to miss
close_reason: Made demo banner highly visible with orange gradient, larger text, and prominent CTA button

title: For the incidents listed in the individual member cards, make them clickable so the user can view them in Rootly or PagerDuty
close_reason: Made incidents clickable with external links to Rootly/PagerDuty. Added getIncidentUrl helper function and ExternalLink icon.

title: Provide a base Docker image with the packages already installed
close_reason: Base Docker images configured for Docker Hub distribution at rootlyio/on-call-health-*-base

title: Fix 'Latest analysis data is incomplete' message showing during running analysis
description: When running a new analysis and the analysis is still in progress, the message 'Latest analysis data is incomplete. Please run a new analysis.' incorrectly appears. This message should not show while an analysis is actively running.
close_reason: Fixed: Skip showing 'incomplete' error when analysis status is pending/running/started

title: Resolve merge conflict in PR #170
description: Resolve the merge conflict in https://github.com/Rootly-AI-Labs/On-Call-Health/pull/170
close_reason: Resolved merge conflict in unified_burnout_analyzer.py imports, merged PR #170 with local changes

close_reason: Moved UserIncidentCard to top right in a grid layout with Overall Risk Level card

description:

- 'Risk Level' text is repetitive (appears in title and below score)
- Consider bolding or using h1 for the top title
- Make the tile more visually appealing

Suggestions: Remove redundant 'Risk Level' label under score, improve typography hierarchy
close_reason: Improved tile: removed redundant text, horizontal layout with title/score left and badge right, larger typography

close_reason: Updated frontend/.env to point to http://localhost:8000
